titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 5944

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=802 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 13:36:57.975545+00 | translation moa=803 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 13:36:57.986178+00

p.cl:
. Omnibus Christi fidelibus presens scriptum visuris uel Audituris  Radulfus Nobilis salutem .
in domino .

me presenti carta mea sigillo meo singnata me
et heredes meos In perpetuum obligasse quod occasione carte Prioris et Conuentus Dunelmensis
Ecclesie quam michi fecerint super terra quam de eis Iure hereditario tenebo In villa de
Lambertona silicet vnum Toftum . et quatuor accras terre prout Continetur In carta eorum inde
Confecta non qu[e]ram defensionem . uel warantizac[i]onem a dictis Priore et conuentu
si contigit ab aliquo questionem moueri in foro clericali uel laycali super dicta terra .
Et quod conseruabo Priorem et conuentum Dunelmensem . et Priorem et conuentum de Coldingham indempnes
in omnibus  quantum ad predictam terram . Et si placitum inde motum fuerit  ego et heredes
mei onera tocius placiti sustinebimus . Et quod fidelitatem inuiolabilem eis in
hac parte obseruabimus .

In Cuius Rei testimonium  presenti scripto pro me et heredibus meis
sigillum meum apposui .

Hiis Testibus Domino Willelmo de Mordingtona . Domino Willelmo de Screm
erstona . Adam de Prendergest’ . Roberto filio Gregori de Coldingham . Dauid de Lumesden . Adam filio Iohannis
de Eytona superiori . Iohanne filio Ingerami de eadem uilla . Bertramo de Ristona . Patricio Scotto . Grego
rio de Betyoc
To all Christ's faithful who shall view or hear the present writing, Ralph Noble sends greeting in the Lord.

by having sealed the present charter with my seal, to have obliged myself and my heirs for ever, that on account of the charter of the Prior and Convent of the Church of Durham which they made for me concerning the land which I shall hold of them by right of heritage in the toun of Lamberton, to wit, one toft, and four acres of land, as it is specified in their charter composed concerning that matter, I shall not seek defence or warrandice from the said Prior and Convent if it should happen that a demand be moved by anyone in a clerical or a lay court over the said land, and that I shall keep the Prior and Convent of Durham, and the Prior and Convent of Coldingham free from financial loss in all things as to the aforesaid land. And if a plea should be moved upon it, I and my heirs shall support the expenses of the whole of the plea; and that we shall keep inviolate faith on this side.
In testimony of this matter, I have put my seal to the present writing for myself and my heirs.

With these witnesses: the lord William of Mordington; the lord William of Scremerston; Adam of Prenderguest; Robert son of Gregory of Coldingham; David of Lumsdaine; Adam son of John of Over Ayton; John son of Ingram, of the same toun; Bertram of Reston; Patrick Scott; Gregory of Beoch.
